name: chief-of-staff
description: An always-on digital Chief of Staff for founders and executives. Turns a noisy inbox, calendar, and meeting stream into a clear operating picture — email triage, meeting prep, daily briefs, and follow-through. Powered by Apexti (apexti.com).

toolbelt_api_key.title: Toolbelt API key
toolbelt_api_key.description: The API key Chief-of-Staff uses to reach its tools and memory (Toolbelt → Settings → Connect to Claude).
